authors: Babette Hermans Cato Waeterloos Michaël Opgenhaffen a Media
raw_title: The Remediation of Fact-Checks on Social Media: Insights from a Multi-Platform Content Analysis
title_en: The Remediation of Fact-Checks on Social Media: Insights from a Multi-Platform Content Analysis
title_zh: 社交媒体上事实核查的再媒介化：来自多平台内容分析的见解
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了事实核查内容在多个社交媒体平台上的传播和呈现方式，探讨了这些内容如何被重新包装和分享，以帮助公众更好地理解事实核查在社交媒体上的作用。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how fact-checking content is spread and presented across multiple social media platforms, exploring how it gets repackaged and shared to help the public understand the role of fact-checking on social media.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻时代社交媒体上信息验证和传播的动态，关注事实核查内容在不同平台上的适应性和影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the dynamics of information verification and dissemination on social media in the digital journalism era, focusing on how fact-checking content adapts and impacts across different platforms.
